news.headline: New feature allows 0-fee deposits for USDT in the wallet; withdrawal fees unchanged.
news.summary: Recently, there has been a significant drop in the stock market, with the main index falling by approximately 5%. This plunge has resulted in a loss of billions of dollars for investors. Alongside this, various industries have been impacted, with tech companies experiencing a notable decrease in their stock prices. The market volatility has caused concern among analysts and investors alike, as uncertainty looms over the future performance of the stock market. The sudden downturn has also impacted unemployment rates, leading to a rise in job losses across multiple sectors. Experts are closely monitoring the situation and advising caution in investment decisions during this turbulent period.

news.headline: Wisconsin Investment Board boosts Bitcoin exposure to $321M, consolidates into single ETF.
news.summary: The state's pension fund has decided to boost its investment in Bitcoin, increasing its exposure to the cryptocurrency. Simultaneously, the fund has consolidated its investments by moving them into a single exchange-traded fund. This move reflects a growing trend towards digital assets among institutional investors, with the pension fund now holding a significant amount of Bitcoin and utilizing an ETF for streamlined investment management.

news.headline: Dow Jones down, SoundHound falls due to Nvidia news, Meta gains. GameStop and SoundHound in focus.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones underperformed compared to other key stock market indexes, with notable movements from GameStop and SoundHound. SoundHound experienced a significant drop following news related to Nvidia, while Meta continued to rise.

news.headline: AstraZeneca's Imfinzi + neoadjuvant chemo improve survival outcomes in bladder cancer patients, per study.
news.summary: AstraZeneca Plc (NASDAQ: AZN) recently released findings from a post-hoc exploratory subgroup analysis of the NIAGARA Phase 3 trial. The study revealed that Imfinzi (durvalumab), when given perioperatively alongside neoadjuvant chemotherapy, led to enhancements in event-free survival (EFS) and overall survival (OS) compared to neoadjuvant chemotherapy with radical cystectomy alone for patients with or without a pathologic complete response (pCR) in muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC). Patients underwent four cycles of Imfinzi with neoadjuvant chemotherapy before radical surgery. Separately, AstraZeneca has decided to abandon a UK vaccine plant worth over $550 million, citing a challenging environment. (approx. 350 words)

news.headline: Despite $500M Bitcoin ETF outflows, Cathie Wood maintains her $1.5M prediction as whales' buying could spark a market turnaround.
news.summary: Large Bitcoin holders have been buying the dip as Bitcoin ETF outflows reached nearly $500 million over a span of three days. This trend suggests a potential market reversal on the horizon.

news.headline: XRP ETF approval chances at 81% on Polymarket after SEC’s nod to Grayscale XRP ETF, traders optimistic for 2025.
news.summary: Traders are feeling optimistic following the SEC's acknowledgement of Grayscale's XRP ETF. Polymarket odds currently predict an 81% chance of approval by 2025.

news.headline: Pfizer study shows Talzenna/Xtandi combo improves survival in metastatic prostate cancer patients. Trial demonstrated significant improvement in survival vs placebo, with 49% reduction in death risk.
news.summary: Pfizer Inc. shared findings on Thursday from the Phase 3 TALAPRO-2 trial of Talzenna and Xtandi for metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer. The study displayed a significant advancement in overall survival compared to placebo plus Xtandi in mCRPC patients, with or without HRR gene mutations. The trial examined two groups of patients: unselected (cohort 1) and those chosen for HRR gene-mutations (cohort 2). Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com, including information on a 49% reduced risk of death with the Keytruda combination therapy in urothelial cancer.

news.headline: Dr. Henry Geoffrey Watson launches scholarship for healthcare education after 30 years in medicine.
news.summary: In Oakland, California on February 14, 2025, Dr. Henry Geoffrey Watson, a renowned physician and community leader with more than 30 years of expertise in internal medicine and preventative health, has introduced the Dr. Henry Geoffrey Watson Scholarship for upcoming individuals.

LTL market to rise by $110.7 billion (USD) from 2025-2029 due to e-commerce boost, AI impacting industry per Technavio report.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, a report was released detailing the projected growth of the less-than-truckload (LTL) market, forecasting an increase of USD 110.7 billion from 2025 to 2029. The growth of the market is expected to advance at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.8% throughout the forecast period. This information comes from a study that analyzes market evolution with the assistance of artificial intelligence (AI).

REACH LA Gala on Feb 15 to honor Guillermo Diaz, raising funds for LA Fire Relief and mental health through arts.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based non-profit organization REACH LA is set to honor community activists and partners while raising funds for LA Fire Relief and promoting mental health through creative arts programs. The event, scheduled for tomorrow, February 15, 2025, will mark the organization's 3rd Annual gathering. This initiative aims to support the community by bringing together individuals dedicated to different causes. The funds raised will contribute to LA Fire Relief efforts, providing assistance to those affected by the fires. Additionally, the event will highlight the importance of mental health by offering creative arts programming. This event serves as a platform for recognizing the valuable contributions of community members and partners while addressing critical issues such as fire relief and mental well-being.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Investment Company buys $436.9M of BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF, marking significant sovereign wealth fund allocation.
news.summary: During the last quarter of 2024, Abu Dhabi's sovereign wealth fund, Mubadala Investment Company, acquired $436.9 million worth of shares in BlackRock's spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund. This marked one of the initial known instances of a sovereign wealth fund investing in Bitcoin-related financial products. The purchase was confirmed in a regulatory filing released on Friday. This investment aligned with BlackRock receiving a commercial license to operate in Abu Dhabi in November. BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF, listed as IBIT on NASDAQ, has shown significant growth. Please refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: TRUMP (CRYPTO: TRUMP) rises 42%, Dogwifhat (CRYPTO: WIF) up 25%. Dogwifhat noted for an aggressive rebound as market sentiment shifts.
news.summary: Dogwifhat (CRYPTO: WIF) and OFFICIAL TRUMP (CRYPTO: TRUMP) meme coins saw remarkable gains on Friday. OFFICIAL TRUMP rose by 41.6% to $23.00, with a market cap of $4.6 billion, and a 7-day uptrend of 33.7%. Dogwifhat surged by 26.8% to $0.7399, holding a market cap of $739.1 million, and a 7-day trend of 2.7%. SPX6900 (CRYPTO: SPX) also performed well, climbing 17.3% to $0.8429, with a market cap of $784.7 million and a 7-day uptrend of 38.6%. Influential analyst Cryptomist mentioned a positive market bias, anticipating Dogwifhat to follow the upward trend. She highlighted the importance of a strong rebound to reach $1.40 as the next resistance level. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Chemed Corp. pays 50-cent quarterly dividend, 215th straight, to be paid on Mar 14, 2025 to shareholders as of Feb 24, 2025.
news.summary: Chemed Corporation (NYSE: CHE) based in Cincinnati declared a quarterly cash dividend of 50 cents per share for its capital stock. The dividend will be paid on March 14, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 24, 2025. This is consistent with the dividend distributed in December 2024. Remarkably, this marks the 215th consecutive quarterly dividend issued by Chemed in its 53-year history as a public company. Chemed is listed on the New York Stock Exchange and has its headquarters in Cincinnati.

news.headline: Baidu's stock rises on chatbot plans, set to offer AI chatbot for free in April, amid competition with Alibaba and DeepSeek.
news.summary: Shares of Baidu rose on the stock market following the announcement by the Chinese tech giant that it will provide its AI chatbot for free beginning in April. This move comes as Baidu engages in a competition with companies like Alibaba and DeepSeek in the AI sector. The news led to a boost in Baidu's stock, indicating investor optimism about the potential impact of the free AI chatbot offering on the company's performance. It signifies a strategic move by Baidu to expand its presence and capabilities in the growing AI market. The announcement has stirred interest in the tech industry and among investors, with Baidu's stock showing a positive trend in response.

news.headline: Moderna CEO addresses concerns, stock rose; commits to collaboration with Trump admin. Stock reverses.
news.summary: Moderna's CEO, Stephane Bancel, has announced collaboration with the current administration. Following this news, Moderna's stock price experienced an increase during midday trading. This positive market response occurred as concerns raised by RFK Jr. were addressed by Bancel, resulting in a reversal of Moderna's stock performance.

news.headline: Palo Alto Networks reports revenue growth, beats expectations, with Q2 revenues at $2.26 billion, RPO at $13 billion. Analysts optimistic with price targets raised.
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc (NASDAQ:PANW) reported upbeat fiscal second-quarter results, with revenues growing by 14% year-on-year to $2.26 billion, exceeding the consensus of $2.24 billion. Analyst Gabriela Borges from Goldman Sachs reiterated a Buy rating and raised the price target to $215.00, highlighting the company's strong RPO performance and expectations of FCF margins remaining above 37% through fiscal 2027. Needham analyst Matt Dezort maintained a Buy rating with a price target of $230, noting that the revenue beat was driven by Product growth (+8%) and Subscription (+16%). RPO grew by 21% to $13 billion, with an average contract duration of around 3 years. PANW aims for FCF margins of 37%-38%+ through FY27.

news.headline: NumbersUSA appoints Anne Manetas and Roy Beck as co-CEOs, leading immigration-reduction efforts since Oct. 2025.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 14, 2025, the Board of the NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation appointed Anne Manetas and Roy Beck as co-CEOs, prominent figures in immigration reduction efforts. They had been interim leaders since October and will now officially oversee the organization together. This decision marks a significant development in the foundation's leadership structure.

news.headline: Digital Ally, Inc. closed a $15.0 million public offering on Feb 14, 2025, allowing them to fund future endeavors.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Digital Ally, Inc. (Nasdaq: DGLY) successfully completed a firm commitment underwritten public offering, generating gross proceeds of around $15.0 million for the company. This capital will be used for the development, manufacturing, and marketing of advanced video recording products and safety equipment across various sectors such as law enforcement, emergency management, fleet safety, and event security. The offering officially closed on the same date.

news.headline: Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston reports $82.1M net income for Q4 and $290.5M for 2024, declares dividend.

They disclosed a net income of $82.1 million for the fourth quarter and $290.5 million for the entire year. The Bank is preparing to submit its annual financial report for further review.

Zoetis gets USDA conditional license for Avian Influenza Vaccine, H5N2 subtype, for use in chickens.
news.summary: Zoetis, based in Parsippany, N.J., has received a conditional license from the U.S. Department of Agriculture's Center for Veterinary Biologics for its Avian Influenza Vaccine, H5N2 Subtype, Killed Virus designed for chickens. The approval was granted based on safety, purity, and efficacy demonstrations using serology data. This vaccine approval signifies Zoetis' dedication to serving poultry producers with a scientifically-backed solution.
